<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; /** * OutputAware interface. * * Used to pass the Shell's OutputInterface into components that need to write * messages directly to the console. */ interface OutputAware { /** * Set the OutputInterface instance. */ public function setOutput(OutputInterface $output): void; }
